oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Thach, Seha
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: <p>This record publishes a small demonstrator of palm-leaf manuscripts from the LB01 bundle (Vietnam), consisting of five recto leaves. Phase 1 makes the material Findable–Citable–Searchable with open standards so that later HTR/NLP work can build on it. Contents: five TIFF images (LB01_001r.tif … LB01_005r.tif), labuong_dc.csv (Dublin Core 15 with BCP-47 language tags and ISO 15924 script codes), and labuong_mini_index.csv (identifier, subject, toponym_geonames_id). Standards: DCMI/DC-15; BCP-47; ISO 15924; GeoNames. A DOI is minted by Zenodo/DataCite and OAI-PMH is available. IIIF manifest and ALTO (segmentation-only) files will be linked under Related identifiers. Provenance: Tra Vinh University; Rights: CC BY 4.0. Contact: Seha Thach, Tra Vinh Univeristy, thseha@tvu.edu.vn.</p>
oai_dc:dc.dc:subject: palm-leaf; Khmer; Pali; IIIF; ALTO
oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Khmer Palm-Leaf Manuscripts in Southern Vietnam
